timeTravel.title: Time Travel
timeTravel.description: Switch between days to view past logs.

calorieBudget.title: Calorie Budget
calorieBudget.description: Keep an eye on your daily budget and remaining calories here.

macroBreakdown.title: Macro Breakdown
macroBreakdown.description: Track your macros to ensure you are hitting your specific goals.

yourMeals.title: Your Meals
yourMeals.description: In this section you can add your daily intake.

yourProgress.title: Your Progress
yourProgress.description: Watch your consistency pay off! This chart visualizes your intake trends over time.

yourProfile.title: Your profile
yourProfile.description: Here you can change your biometric, so we can calculate your daily macros.

manualSearch.title: Manual Search
manualSearch.description: Type here to quickly search our database for your favorite foods and ingredients.

smartScanning.title: Smart Scanning & AI
smartScanning.description: Too tired to type? Scan a product's barcode or just snap a photo of your plate, and let our AI do the heavy lifting!

activity.title: Daily Activities
activity.description: Log your workouts here - choose an activity, set the duration, and we'll calculate the calories burned for you.

recordNotFound: If you didn't find your food, you can add it here or try scanning.

takePictureModal.takePictureDesc: Take a clear picture of your food to analyze its macros.
takePictureModal.reviewDesc: Review the AI-estimated nutritional values below.

modalScanFood.title: Camera scanner
modalScanFood.subtitle: Using phone camera to scan product or analyze with AI
modalScanFood.disclaimerText: AI-estimated macros may not be 100% accurate. For precise tracking, weigh your food with a scale and input the details manually.

modalBarcodeScan.title: Scan Barcode
modalBarcodeScan.subtitle: Align the barcode within the frame to fetch nutrition macros.
modalBarcodeScan.detectedWait: We detected a barcode, please wait until your food is loaded.
modalBarcodeScan.autoFetch: We'll automatically fetch the macros. If the product isn't found, you can add it manually.
modalBarcodeScan.chromeBug: Try pressing the zoom buttons while scanning if you have trouble with detection. Chrome's built-in scanner can be buggy, but zooming usually helps.
modalBarcodeScan.notFoundPrompt: The barcode you scanned was not found. Would you like to add it manually?
modalBarcodeScan.noCamera: No camera was found on this device.
modalBarcodeScan.cameraInUse: Camera is already in use by another application.
modalBarcodeScan.cameraUnsupported: This browser does not support camera access.
modalBarcodeScan.cameraError: An error occurred while accessing the camera:

chart.logThreeDays: Please log at least 3 days of meals to see the graph.

newFoodModal.title: Adding {{name}} to daily intake
newFoodModal.subtitle: Adjust total weight to scale macros

modalCreateFood.title: Add Custom Food
modalCreateFood.subtitle: Enter food details per 100g to create custom record
modalCreateFood.toastError: There was an error while trying to save new food.
modalCreateFood.toastBadValue: Can't save your food record, grams shouldn't be lower than 1.

editFoodModal.title: Edit {{name}}
editFoodModal.subtitle: Adjust total weight to scale macros

newActivityModal.title: Log New Activity
newActivityModal.subtitle: Select an activity and duration to calculate calories burned

toast.error: There was an error updating your intake.

error.failedToLoadDesc: Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.failedToLoadAll: Failed to load food and activity logs.

validation.nameMinLength: Food name must be at least 2 characters
validation.macroAtLeastOne: At least one nutrient must be greater than zero
validation.caloriesBurnedMin: Calories burned must be at least 0
